title: General Mills Quarterly Dividend Declared
text: MINNEAPOLIS--( BUSINESS WIRE )--The General Mills Board of Directors today declared a quarterly dividend at the prevailing rate of $0.54 per share, payable May 1, 2023, to shareholders of record as of April 10, 2023. General Mills (NYSE: GIS) and its predecessor company have paid dividends without interruption for 124 years.
